name: Ransomware: Petya / NotPetya IOC in Flows
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC (Filename, File Hash, Hostname, IP) related to Petya Ransomware is observed.

Note: The Petya_File_Hash, Petya_File_Name, Petya_Hostname, Petya_IP have been prepopulated. Tune these Reference Sets with relevant IOC.
conditions_text: when the flow matches "File Hash" is not NULL OR "file name" is not NULL OR "HTTP Host" is not NULL OR flowdirection != 'L2L' AQL filter query

when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_File_Hash', "File Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_File_Name', "file name") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_HostName', "HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', sourcev6) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', destinationv6) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Ransomware: Petya / NotPetya IOC in Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches "File Hash" is not NULL OR "file name" is not NULL OR "HTTP Host" is not NULL OR flowdirection != 'L2L' AQL filter query

AND when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_File_Hash', "File Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_File_Name', "file name") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_HostName', "HTTP Host") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', sourcev6) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', destinationv6) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Petya / NotPetya IOC Detected
Event description: An IOC (Filename, File Hash, Hostname, IP) related to Petya / NotPetya Ransomware has been observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
